center.name: 雨季
center.summary: 雨季是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括小灰頭稚冠雉、Long-toed lapwing、錘頭鸛等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species usually breeds in the wet season in colonies in trees, reedbeds or cliffs

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It uses pool edges in the dry season, and in the wet season can often be found in flooded rice fields and wet grasslands. Birds are sedentary as long as water remains

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plain chachalaca typically breeds in the early wet season

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Tanzania, it has also recently begun to feed on rocky shores. In Arabia, it is found in rocky wadis with running water and trees. Most are sedentary within their territories, which are held by pairs, but some migrate into suitable habitat during the wet season only
